form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1660m after showing early speed at Parkes, beaten 12 m by Stay Strong (2:05.60) in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $8.50. Before that, was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 1720m at Young beaten 30 m by Smooth Chakra (2:05.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $41. Watch for a spike in form.

Before that, was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 1720m at Young beaten 30 m by Smooth Chakra (2:05.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $41. Watch for a spike in form.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 5th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst beaten 15 m by Snipers Fire (2:05.10) in 2yo MAIDEN on November 5 at $61. Can be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First up. At the last run he 5th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst beaten 15 m by Snipers Fire (2:05.10) in 2yo MAIDEN on November 5 at $61. Can be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Stay Strong, a rival who he faces again; when 16 metres sixth at Parkes over 1660m in a 0-1 WIN race on April 4. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well beaten last start by Stay Strong, a rival who he faces again; when 16 metres sixth at Parkes over 1660m in a 0-1 WIN race on April 4. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced racing around the first turn when Stuckinafence galloped.
Tired over the concluding stages of the event.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 5th (Sr2) over 1720m at this track was 5th-8.7m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 12 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:10.40) in MAIDEN on December 26 at $51. Might need this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First up. At the last run he 5th (Sr2) over 1720m at this track was 5th-8.7m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 12 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:10.40) in MAIDEN on December 26 at $51. Might need this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear racing room in the run to the finish and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Memphis Fury at Bathurst over 1730m in a NR 46 to 48 on March 27 at $81. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Soho Betty Dee at Parkes over 1660m in a 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $6.50. Should be there at the business end.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Memphis Fury at Bathurst over 1730m in a NR 46 to 48 on March 27 at $81. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Soho Betty Dee at Parkes over 1660m in a 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $6.50. Should be there at the business end.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear racing room until the final 150m.
Near the 100m shifted out when not sufficiently clear of Alwaysatthebeach.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Official View at Junee over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $21. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Harjaybro at Temora over 1635m in a 0-1 WIN on April 6 at $7.50. Another bold showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Official View at Junee over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $21. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Harjaybro at Temora over 1635m in a 0-1 WIN on April 6 at $7.50. Another bold showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after straightening shifted out momentarily tightening Eyes Off Tiger.
Led the event failed to run on to finish in seventh position beaten 25.3m.
Broke stride in the middle stages of the score up on the second occasion.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1660m after showing early speed and racing wide at Parkes, beaten 11 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:03.50) in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $41. Before that, 8th (Fr5) over 1720m at Young, at the bell was 9th-15 beaten 12 m by Maggie Moth (2:07.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $126. May do better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1660m after showing early speed and racing wide at Parkes, beaten 11 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:03.50) in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $41. Before that, 8th (Fr5) over 1720m at Young, at the bell was 9th-15 beaten 12 m by Maggie Moth (2:07.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $126. May do better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow out. Broke gait clear of interference passing the 500m.
Tired to be beaten in excess of 100m.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after only six days break. Lacklustre first-up performance when 8th (Sr4) over 1660m at Parkes beaten 23 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:03.50) in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $16. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes here second-up after only six days break. Lacklustre first-up performance when 8th (Sr4) over 1660m at Parkes beaten 23 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:03.50) in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $16. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and paced roughly approaching the 500m when Chasin You shifted out.

form.formComment: Last start won by 8 m as favourite (Sr2) at Parkes (2:05.60) beating Happy Tulhurst in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $2.40. Can overcome the awkward draw to score again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start won by 8 m as favourite (Sr2) at Parkes (2:05.60) beating Happy Tulhurst in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $2.40. Can overcome the awkward draw to score again.

form.formComment: Resuming after a layoff of 20 months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation when tenth at very long odds behind Madeablue. Has been in work for a little while but after a lengthy break may need the run.
